description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in urban streetwear, featuring a loose-fitting short-sleeve shirt with a large stylized letter on the back and layered gold chains around the neck. He wears baggy pants with decorative stitching and a utility pouch strapped at the waist. His face is partially covered by a bandana and he sports a bucket hat, with visible tattoos on both forearms. Black gloves cover his hands, and he wears sturdy boots suitable for walking on city streets. The overall appearance suggests a confident, streetwise individual, accessorized for both style and practicality.
description: Urban adult male in streetwear with a bandana, bucket hat, gold chains, baggy pants, and utility pouch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bandana-covered face, gold chains, gloves, and utility pouch at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, pouch, and the profile of the bucket hat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large stylized letter on the shirt's back and decorative stitching on the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the other arm's tattoos and the side profile of the boots and pouch.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a short-sleeve shirt, baggy pants, utility pouch, and layered accessories
